title: Dashboard
description: Main project dashboard. Live metrics, division overview, and external tool links.

title: Setup Checklist
description: 8-step initialization checklist for new AIz Intel instances.

title: Idea & Problem
description: Problem statement, target audience personas, proposed solution, UVP, and key assumptions.

title: Business Plan
description: Business model canvas, TAM/SAM/SOM, revenue model, team, and risk matrix.

title: Unit Economics
description: S-curve projections, break-even analysis, CAC, LTV, churn, and cash flow scenarios.

title: Pricing
description: Pricing tiers, competitor price matrix, value perception analysis, and price adequacy.

title: Competitor Analysis
description: Competitor cards, feature comparison matrix, positioning map, and SWOT analysis.

title: Launch Plan
description: Launch phases, early adopter strategy, paid vs organic channels, and partnership strategy.

title: Marketing Strategy
description: ICP definition, messaging matrix, channel strategy, budget, and campaign calendar.

title: Risk Register
description: Risk register, heat map, category taxonomy, and mitigation status tracker.

title: Tech Plan
description: Architecture diagram, stack decision log, sprint checklists, and API surface summary.

title: Zero to Hero
description: Environment setup, bootstrap command sequence, architecture decisions, and gotchas.

title: DB Schema
description: Table definitions, relationships, indexes, and migration history.

title: Code Review
description: Code quality issue register with severity, file location, recommended fix, and status.

title: Disaster Recovery
description: Recovery runbooks, RTO/RPO targets, escalation matrix, and post-mortem template.

title: Roadmap
description: Timeline swimlanes, milestone definitions, and quarterly planning across all divisions.

title: Brand Guidelines
description: Logo usage, color palette, typography system, and copy tone of voice.

title: Cost Tracking
description: Expense log, budget vs actuals, burn rate, and one-time vs recurring split.

title: Operational Costs
description: Monthly SaaS/infra costs, one-time setup costs, contractor costs, and unit economics.

title: OKRs & KPIs
description: Quarterly OKRs with key results and KPI dashboard with live metric cards.

title: Customer Support
description: Support tiers and SLAs, FAQ template, escalation chain, and refund policy.

title: Customer Memory
description: CRM-style customer contact cards with interaction history and next steps.

title: Terms of Service
description: Service description, user obligations, IP, liability, termination, and GDPR/LGPD compliance.

title: Privacy Policy
description: Data collection, legal basis, usage, retention, third-party processors, GDPR/LGPD/CCPA rights.

title: Cookie Policy
description: Cookie types, consent mechanism, third-party cookies, and opt-out instructions.

title: DPA & SLA
description: Data Processing Agreement (GDPR Art. 28) and Service Level Agreement with uptime commitments.

title: Pitch Deck
description: 11-slide pitch deck: problem, solution, market size, business model, traction, team, financials, use of funds, cap table, comparables, and the ask.

title: Investor Memory
description: CRM investor pipeline tracker with contact cards, interaction history, and pipeline status.
